name: healthcare_technology_reconciliation_job_oakline_tru_loy
premise: A Healthcare Technology response desk is in a fast-moving incident involving healthcare technology reconciliation job oakline tru loy. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is within 20 minutes. Every delay increases harm prevention and accountability. Stakeholders are already framing this as truth vs loyalty under pressure. This decision will be treated as precedent unless you explicitly time-box it. Constraints: Make the intervention reversible and time-boxed with named accountability. Preserve evidence under audit and litigation-hold.

agents.name: Marco Mensah
agents.identity: I am Marco Mensah, accountable for a defensible call in Healthcare Technology when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays loyalty for truth.

agents.name: Keisha Kowalski
agents.identity: I am Keisha Kowalski, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Healthcare Technology.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so loyalty isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of truth.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect loyalty.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to loyalty to secure truth under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is within 20 minutes. Evidence is partial. Marco Mensah must decide under truth vs loyalty. What does Marco Mensah do?
